arts.ttl: Europa League - Last-16 second leg predictions
arts.sum: Aidan Perkins previews all eight second legs in the last-16 stage of the Europa League on Thursday and has a score prediction for each clash.

arts.ttl: Preview: Olympiacos vs. Bodo/Glimt - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Thursday's Europa League clash between Olympiacos and Bodo/Glimt, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
